subcodes.first_line: O Javád! The Lord of creation hath come with a Command that no affairs can withstand, and with a sovereignty that no veils of glory can obscure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جواد قد اتی مالک الایجاد بامر مامنعته الامور و بسلطان لم تحجبه سبحات
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power of prayer, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort
